---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, CLI command, or capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Feature Summary

One-sentence description of the proposed feature.

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is it valuable?

Example:
- "When X, I have to do Y manually, but it should be Z"

## 📋 Detailed Proposal

### User-facing change

If CLI-related, show what the new command/flag would look like:

```bash
./skills new-command --flag value
```

If Skill-related, describe the Skill's purpose, triggers, and example usage:

```yaml
name: my-new-skill
description: ...
```

### Internals

Optional: implementation sketch (functions to add, files to create, manifest schema changes).

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is the proposed approach better?

## 🌐 Compatibility

- [ ] Backward-compatible (no breaking changes)
- [ ] Requires migration (please describe)
- [ ] Affects source manifest schema
- [ ] Affects symlink structure

## 📎 Examples / Mockups

Links, screenshots, or worked examples that clarify the request.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This aligns with the project's purpose (cross-Agent Skills management)
